resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def separateDigits(self, nums: List[int]) -> List[int]:
        return [int(x) for num in nums for x in str(num)]
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(N)
space complexity: O(N)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution iterates through each number in the input list `nums`. For each number, it converts it to a string, then iterates through each character (digit) of the string and appends it to a new list. This approach provides a straightforward and efficient way to separate the digits of each number in the input list.
